---
title: "BAA1030 - Data Analytics and Story Telling"
subtitle: "Lecture 5: Advanced Features in Tableau"
author: "Damien Dupré - Dublin City University"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "metropolis", "metropolis-fonts", "css/custom_design.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      beforeInit: "libs/cols_macro.js"
      highlightStyle: zenburn
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      
params:
  module_code: "BAA1030"
  assignment_1_deadline: "23/03/2026"
---

```{r child = '/Users/damienhome/Drive/Projects/lectures/tableau/advanced_features.Rmd'}
```
